Title: ZmMYB127 controls maize endosperm filling via dual-transcriptional regulation to improve grain yield and quality

Regulation_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: R2R3-MYB transcription factor; contains EAR repression motif 'LSLSLG'
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite: starch; storage protein; vitamin B6; vitamin B9; phosphorus; iron; zinc
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site: Endosperm, especially central starchy endosperm and aleurone layer
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Seed reserve accumulation and grain nutritional quality
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes maize endosperm filling, aleurone maintenance, starch/protein accumulation, vitamin B6/B9 and P/Fe/Zn deposition, and increases kernel weight, hardness and test weight
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Core filling-endosperm-specific dual-function regulator coordinating yield and nutrient deposition; overexpression improves grain yield and quality without detectable agronomic penalty
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: CRISPR/Cas9 knockout; filling-endosperm-specific overexpression; RT-qPCR; CUT&Tag-seq; EMSA; dual-luciferase assay; pull-down; BiFC; Co-IP; field trials; nutrient profiling; cytology
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Activates NKD1 and NKD2; represses O2 and CR4; also affects AL9, zein genes and starch metabolism-related genes
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Endosperm filling, reserve biosynthesis, aleurone development/maintenance, nutrient deposition
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Forms activation complex with O2; forms repressive ternary complex with ZmLUG3 and ZmABI4
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Endosperm-specific and strongest during filling stage (10–36 DAP); ubiquitously distributed across endosperm regions
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: High in filling endosperm; overexpression under 27-kDa γ-zein promoter in maize endosperm
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Field trials across years and locations (Hefei, Sanya, Zhanjiang)
Regulation_Genes.Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation: Participates in regulatory circuitry with O2, including O2→ZmMYB127 activation and ZmMYB127-mediated repression of O2
Regulation_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: No detectable penalty in plant architecture, ear traits or kernel number per ear under tested conditions
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Strong candidate for precision breeding and metabolic engineering to simultaneously improve grain yield, hardness, protein/starch and micronutrients; suitable for elite hybrid introgression and possible promoter/CRE editing or EAR motif editing
Regulation_Genes.Omics_Data: CUT&Tag-seq: NGDC BioProject PRJCA044247, CRA028659; RNA-seq: NGDC BioProject PRJCA047065, CRA030621
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. ZmMYB127 is a filling-endosperm-specific MYB TF required for aleurone maintenance and endosperm reserve accumulation. 2. It directly binds target promoters and exerts dual regulation by activating NKD1/2 and repressing O2 and CR4. 3. Overexpression enhances kernel weight, quality and nutritional value in maize and in elite hybrid Zhengdan958 without obvious agronomic trade-offs.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Identified as the first dual-function TF reported in maize endosperm development; CRE1 is its direct binding motif; EAR motif is required for repression.

Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Storage reserve accumulation and grain quality
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Co-activates NKD1/2 with ZmMYB127 and positively contributes to endosperm filling, starch and protein accumulation
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Known master regulator of endosperm storage compound synthesis; in this study it is a core co-activator and upstream activator of ZmMYB127
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: EMSA; pull-down; BiFC; Co-IP; double mutant analysis; RT-qPCR; dual-luciferase assay; prior DAP-seq referenced in study
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Activates NKD1/2 and ZmMYB127; positively affects zein and starch biosynthesis genes
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Endosperm filling and storage reserve biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation: Feedforward/reciprocal circuit with ZmMYB127: O2 activates ZmMYB127, while ZmMYB127 represses O2
Regulation_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: o2 mutation reduces kernel filling and storage accumulation; previous high-lysine germplasm application limited by adverse kernel traits (background context)
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Can be considered in stacking with ZmMYB127, but direct use may require caution due to known trade-offs
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. O2 binds CRE3 in NKD1/2 promoters and synergizes with ZmMYB127 to activate NKD1/2. 2. O2 physically interacts with ZmMYB127 and positively regulates ZmMYB127 expression. 3. Loss of both O2 and ZmMYB127 aggravates defects in endosperm filling and aleurone morphology.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Also one of the direct repression targets of ZmMYB127-ZmLUG3-ZmABI4 module in this paper.

Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite: starch; storage protein; vitamin/mineral-associated aleurone nutrient deposition
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Supports endosperm filling and nutrient storage
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Acts downstream of ZmMYB127/O2 activation to promote aleurone maintenance and endosperm filling
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Direct target whose activation is central to the positive branch of ZmMYB127 dual regulation
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: CUT&Tag-seq peak analysis; EMSA; RT-qPCR; dual-luciferase assay
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: Transcriptional target activated by ZmMYB127 and O2
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Promoter co-occupied by ZmMYB127 and O2
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Reduced in Zmmyb127 and further reduced in Zmmyb127;o2 endosperm
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential downstream promoter editing target (e.g., CRE1 engineering) suggested by discussion
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. NKD1 is a direct promoter target of ZmMYB127. 2. O2 binds adjacent CRE3 and synergistically enhances NKD1 activation with ZmMYB127. 3. Reduced NKD1 expression correlates with aleurone and filling defects.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Included among core endosperm-filling genes directly regulated by ZmMYB127.

Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite: starch; storage protein; vitamin/mineral-associated aleurone nutrient deposition
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Supports endosperm filling and nutrient storage
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Acts downstream of ZmMYB127/O2 activation to promote aleurone maintenance and endosperm filling
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Direct target whose activation is central to the positive branch of ZmMYB127 dual regulation
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: CUT&Tag-seq peak analysis; EMSA; RT-qPCR; dual-luciferase assay
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: Transcriptional target activated by ZmMYB127 and O2
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Promoter co-occupied by ZmMYB127 and O2
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Reduced in Zmmyb127 and further reduced in Zmmyb127;o2 endosperm
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential downstream promoter engineering target; tandem CRE1 motifs may strengthen activation
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. NKD2 is directly activated by ZmMYB127. 2. O2 binds CRE3 in the NKD2 promoter and synergizes with ZmMYB127 for strong activation. 3. NKD2 expression is further reduced in the Zmmyb127;o2 double mutant, matching stronger filling defects.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: NKD2 promoter contains multiple CRE1 motifs, discussed as potential engineering leverage.

Regulation_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: regulatory receptor-like factor associated with aleurone development
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite: vitamin B6; vitamin B9; phosphorus; iron; zinc; endosperm reserves
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Aleurone development linked to nutrient storage and endosperm filling
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Repressed by ZmMYB127 repressive module; implicated in aleurone developmental control during filling
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Direct repression target in the negative branch of ZmMYB127 dual regulation
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: CUT&Tag-seq peak analysis; EMSA for CRE2 via ZmABI4; RT-qPCR; dual-luciferase assay
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Promoter targeted by ZmMYB127-ZmLUG3-ZmABI4 repression complex
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Upregulated in Zmmyb127 mutant and downregulated in ZmMYB127 overexpression endosperm
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential promoter/CRE editing target to modulate aleurone development and grain quality
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. CR4 is a direct target of ZmMYB127-associated chromatin binding. 2. ZmABI4 binds CRE2 in the CR4 promoter and cooperates with ZmMYB127/ZmLUG3 to repress CR4. 3. Misregulation of CR4 is linked to altered aleurone morphology in Zmmyb127.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Although important in the mechanism, CR4 is a downstream target rather than the primary manipulated gene.

Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite: starch; storage protein; vitamin/mineral-associated aleurone nutrient deposition
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site: Endosperm and aleurone-associated nutrient storage tissues
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Controls transcriptional branch affecting endosperm filling genes
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Acts as CRE2-binding repressor of O2 and CR4 in complex with ZmMYB127 and ZmLUG3
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Provides DNA recognition of CRE2 required for strong repression of O2/CR4 by ZmMYB127 module
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: EMSA; dual-luciferase assay; Y2H negative with ZmMYB127; BiFC; pull-down via ZmLUG3 bridge; Y3H
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Endosperm filling regulatory network and aleurone development branch
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Part of repressive ternary complex with ZmMYB127 and ZmLUG3
Regulation_Genes.Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation: Contributes to repression branch of dual-control circuitry
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for promoter/complex engineering to tune repression branch of endosperm filling network
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. ZmABI4 binds CRE2 motifs in O2 and CR4 promoters. 2. It acts as a transcriptional repressor on these promoters. 3. ZmLUG3 bridges ZmABI4 with ZmMYB127 to form a strong repression module.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Direct interaction with ZmMYB127 was not detected; bridging requires ZmLUG3.

Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite: starch; storage protein; vitamin/mineral-associated aleurone nutrient deposition
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site: Endosperm and aleurone-associated nutrient storage tissues
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Supports repressive control over endosperm filling regulators
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Bridges ZmMYB127 and ZmABI4 to assemble the repression complex that suppresses O2 and CR4
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Essential molecular bridge enabling ZmMYB127 repression branch
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Y2H; BiFC; pull-down; Y3H; dual-luciferase assay
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Enables repression of O2 and CR4 when combined with ZmMYB127 and ZmABI4
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Endosperm filling regulatory network and aleurone development branch
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: EAR motif of ZmMYB127 recruits ZmLUG3
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Core component of ZmMYB127-ZmLUG3-ZmABI4 ternary repression complex
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential engineering node to modulate repression strength, though direct manipulation was not tested
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. ZmLUG3 is the only Gro/Tup1 family member identified to interact with both ZmMYB127 and ZmABI4. 2. It bridges these proteins through EAR motif-dependent association. 3. Inclusion of ZmLUG3 confers strongest repression of O2 and CR4 promoters.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Classified here as regulatory/common-type co-repressor rather than TF.

Regulation_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: R2R3-MYB transcription factor; rice homologue of ZmMYB127 with conserved C-terminal EAR motif
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Supports grain filling and final grain weight
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes rice endosperm filling, aleurone development and grain weight
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Conserved homologue demonstrating cross-cereal functional conservation of ZmMYB127-like control of endosperm filling
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: CRISPR/Cas9 knockout; endosperm-specific overexpression; expression profiling; cytology; grain trait analysis
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: Likely transcriptional regulation; exact downstream mechanism not resolved in this paper
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Expression initiates in ovary at 5 DAF and persists throughout endosperm filling
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: High during rice grain filling; overexpression under GluB-4 promoter
Regulation_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: No detectable changes in plant height, panicle architecture or grain number per panicle under tested conditions
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Promising conserved target for cereal improvement of grain filling and weight in rice and possibly other monocots
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. OsMYB20 is the rice homologue of ZmMYB127 and shows similar grain-filling expression. 2. Knockout causes chalky endosperm, disorganized aleurone and reduced 1,000-grain weight. 3. Endosperm-specific overexpression increases grain dimensions, grain weight and aleurone thickness without obvious plant architecture penalty.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Mechanistic conservation at target-gene level remains unresolved in this study.
